store.name: Claybody Uniform
store.tagline: Washable studio apparel for potters who live in dust and glaze

categories.name: Studio uniforms
categories.description: Cross-back throwing aprons, split-leg wheel aprons, cropped work pants, clay-wash overshirts, smocks, kiln-room chore coats, and washable market jackets.

categories.name: Protective accessories
categories.description: Hair scarves, bandanas, sleeve guards, dust-control cover layers, glaze-safe gloves, towel loops, knee pads, and heat-aware cuffs.

categories.name: Footwear and soft goods
categories.description: Clog socks, washable studio slippers, non-slip studio clogs, compression socks, shoe covers, and laundry bags for clay-heavy clothes.

categories.name: Carry systems
categories.description: Trimming-tool rolls, apron pocket inserts, sponge pouches, needle-tool sleeves, glaze-test card wallets, and market-day crossbody bags.

categories.name: Role-based bundles
categories.description: First studio uniform, pottery teacher week kit, throwing-intensive apron set, glaze-room protection kit, kiln-load layer kit, and market booth outfit pack.

products.name: Cross-Back Throwing Apron
products.description: Clay-shedding cross-back apron with towel loop, split reach, and pocket placement for wet wheel sessions.

products.name: Split-Leg Wheel Apron
products.description: Full lap coverage that opens naturally around the wheel without bunching at the knees.

products.name: Cropped Wheel Pant
products.description: Washable work pant cut above the clog line for seated throwing, trimming, and cleanup days.

products.name: Kiln-Room Chore Coat
products.description: Reinforced overshirt layer for loading days, studio errands, and clay-dust containment.

products.name: Sleeve Guard Pair
products.description: Washable forearm covers for glaze mixing, cleanup, and splatter-heavy sessions.

products.name: Clayroom Bandana Set
products.description: Hair scarves and bandanas for dusty classrooms, handbuilding benches, and market setup.

products.name: Handbuilding Knee Pads
products.description: Low-profile knee pads for slab work, cleanup, and long handbuilding sessions.

products.name: Clog Socks
products.description: Cushioned knit for studio clogs and long teaching days.

products.name: Washable Studio Slippers
products.description: Soft indoor footwear for home pottery spaces and cleanup.

products.name: Clay Laundry Bag
products.description: A dedicated wash bag for clay-heavy clothes after studio sessions.

products.name: Trimming-Tool Roll
products.description: Roll-up carry for trimming tools, ribs, and needle tools.

products.name: Apron Pocket Insert
products.description: Modular pockets for sponge, needle tool, towel, and glaze notes.

products.name: Glaze-Test Card Wallet
products.description: Compact storage for test tiles, glaze notes, and booth references.

products.name: Market-Day Crossbody
products.description: Hands-free bag for sellers moving between studio identity and sales table.

bundles.name: First Studio Uniform
bundles.description: Cross-back apron, cropped wheel pant, clayroom bandana, clog socks, and laundry bag.

bundles.name: Pottery Teacher Week Kit
bundles.description: Short-sleeve smock, clay-wash overshirt, sleeve guards, towel loop, and compression socks.

bundles.name: Glaze-Room Protection Kit
bundles.description: Glaze-safe gloves, sleeve guards, dust-control cover layer, and glaze-test card wallet.

bundles.name: Market Booth Outfit Pack
bundles.description: Washable market jacket, clayroom bandana set, market-day crossbody, and clog socks.
